zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Gaynsford於大約1424年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞可洛爾斯特時，他的父親John Gaynsford IV32歲，母親Margaret Swanson29歲。他於大約1449年與Margaret Sidney在英國英格蘭素瑞卡沙阿爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年5月22日在英國英格蘭素瑞享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Gaynsford于大约1424年出生在英国英格兰素瑞可洛爾斯特时，他的父亲John Gaynsford IV32岁，母亲Margaret Swanson29岁。他于大约1449年与Margaret Sidney在英国英格兰素瑞卡沙阿爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年5月22日在英国英格兰素瑞享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Gaynsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Gaynsford was born about 1424, in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Gaynsford IV, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Swanson, was 29. He married Margaret Sidney about 1449, in Carshalton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 May 1498, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Gaynsford est né environ 1424, à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Gaynsford IV, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Swanson, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sidney environ 1449, à Carshalton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1498, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Gaynsford um 1424 in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gaynsford IV 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Swanson 29. Er hat um 1449 in Carshalton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Margaret Sidney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1498 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaynsford è nato il circa 1424 nel Crowhurst, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Gaynsford IV, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Swanson, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sidney circa 1449, nel Carshalton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1498, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Gaynsfordが約1424年にイギリスイギリススリークロウウルストで生まれた時，父John Gaynsford IVは32歳，母Margaret Swansonは29歳であった。約1449年にイギリスイギリススリーカーシャルトンでMargaret Sidneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年5月22日にイギリスイギリススリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Gaynsford(이)가 대략 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 크로화르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gaynsford IV(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Swanson(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 카샤턴에서 Margaret Sidney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 5월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaynsford nasceu aproximadamente 1424, em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Gaynsford IV, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Swanson, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sidney aproximadamente 1449, em Carshalton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1498, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Gaynsford родился около 1424 г. в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Gaynsford IV было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Swanson, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sidney около 1449 г. в местности каршэлтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 мая 1498 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Sidney aproximadamente 1449, en Carshalton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1498, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
